title: Chef Aid 1 Litre Plastic Measuring Jug, BPA-Free, Dishwasher Safe, Transparent Liquid Measuring Cup with Easy-Read Markings, Ideal for Cooking, Baking, and Food Preparation
features: ACCURATE MEASUREMENTS: This 1-litre measuring jug is perfect for measuring water, milk, oils, and other cooking liquids with precision. Clearly marked measurement lines ensure accurate results every time
EASY TO READ: Features bold, legible measurement indicators for quick and convenient use. The markings are designed to remain visible, even with frequent use and washing
DURABLE: Made from high-quality, BPA-free plastic for safe, long-lasting use in any kitchen. Sturdy construction resists cracking or warping over time
DISHWASHER SAFE: Designed for ease of use and easy cleaning. This measuring jug is dishwasher safe, saving you time on cleanup after cooking or baking
PRACTICAL KITCHEN ESSENTIAL: With a transparent design, this jug is ideal for home cooks and bakers. Part of Chef Aid’s wide range of reliable and affordable kitchenware products
description: From the brand Previous page Chef Aid is the most affordable brand and offers an extensive range of products for the kitchen and home. Chef Aid is based on saving you money without compromising on quality. A complete range of solutions for the home.
